title: dyssodia setifolia var. radiata
intro: Dyssodia setifolia var. radiata, also known as Radiate Dyssodia or Mexican Gold, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family, native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Dyssodia setifolia var. radiata include relief from sore throats, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate menstrual cramps. Dyssodia setifolia var. radiata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
